headline: UBER Stock Plunges 23.4% in 6 Months:Time to Hold or Fold?
summary: Uber shares fall 23.5% in six months on regulatory pressure, Waymo robotaxi fears and soft Q4 EPS but bookings growth and diversification continue.

headline: DoorDash Inc. (DASH) Expands Fuel Relief for Dashers amid Costs Concerns
summary: DoorDash Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) is one of the top growth stocks in billionaire Philippe Laffont’s portfolio. On March 30, Wolfe Research reiterated DoorDash Inc. (NASDAQ:DASH) with an Outperform but cut the price target to $195 from $265. The price target cut comes on the heels of the company announcing fuel price relief for delivery drivers. The […]

headline: DoorDash White House Spotlight On No Tax Tips And Valuation Gap
summary: DoorDash (NasdaqGS:DASH) is featured at a high profile White House event spotlighting a "no tax on tips" policy affecting its drivers. The event highlights how untaxed tips influence gig worker earnings and the broader economics of independent gig work on the platform. DoorDash is presented as an active voice in debates over gig economy regulation and worker classification. The company’s role in this national policy conversation is drawing fresh attention from investors and other...
